news.summary: On June 4, 2025, in Monument, Colorado, Advisors Asset Management (AAM), a top investment solutions provider, revealed the selection of Lindsay DeGrazia as the Managing Director, Head of Alternative Investments Distribution. This appointment, effective since May 19, 2025, has DeGrazia reporting directly to AAM.
news.headline: Advisors Asset Management appoints Lindsay DeGrazia as Managing Director of Alternative Investments Distribution.

news.summary: A well-known manufacturer of high-quality manufactured homes, Oak Creek Homes, headquartered in League City, Texas, has declared the commencement of its yearly Sizzlin' Summer Sale on June 4, 2025. This event offers significant price reductions on specific in-stock models that are ready for immediate delivery. Customers can take advantage of this limited-time sale to purchase their dream homes at discounted rates.
news.headline: Discounts on factory-built homes by Oak Creek Homes in League City, Texas during annual Sizzlin' Summer Sale.

news.summary: SoundHound AI, Inc. announced results from a study showing consumer interest in in-car voice commerce. The study, commissioned by the company, highlights an opportunity for automakers to increase revenue and customer loyalty by enhancing the in-car experience. The technology is estimated to reach a value of $35 billion per year.
news.headline: In-car voice commerce could generate $35B annually for automakers, says research by SoundHound AI.

news.summary: A report on the Bauxite and Alumina Market in China for the period 2019-2024 and forecasts up to 2029 has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report provides comprehensive information on the market, including analysis of the supply and demand dynamics, pricing trends, and insights into downstream industries. It features detailed data presented in tables and figures, along with textual content. This valuable resource is essential for those seeking in-depth understanding of the China Bauxite and Alumina market.
news.headline: China's Bauxite and Alumina market reviewed for 2019-2024, with forecasts up to 2029. Report covers supply, demand, trade, and end-users.

news.summary: A collaboration has been revealed between ZoomInfo and Five by Five (5x5) Data in Vancouver, Wash., aimed at improving and broadening ZoomInfo's B2B data supply chain.
news.headline: ZoomInfo partners with 5x5 Data to enhance B2B data supply chain, expanding reach and diversification.

news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Availity, the primary real-time health information network in the US, has collaborated with Vim, a prominent player in care orchestration for value-based care. This partnership aims to aid payers in simplifying risk and quality care gap closure processes and decreasing provider friction. By adopting a multi-channel strategy, the initiative identifies actionable risk and quality gaps within providers' electronic health record (EHR) systems, enabling swift submission of essential data. This collaboration targets enhancing efficiency in healthcare operations, ultimately benefiting various stakeholders.
news.headline: Availity and Vim partner to streamline care gap notification/closure, reducing provider abrasion.

news.summary: In New York, Clinilabs has announced the appointments of David Hagerman as the Chief Financial Officer and Jeanine Falinski as the Senior Vice President of Commercial Development. Hagerman will oversee financial operations while Falinski will focus on driving commercial growth for the company.
news.headline: Clinilabs appoints David Hagerman as CFO & Jeanine Falinski as SVP of Commercial Development in NYC.

news.summary: In Denver, Swimlane, a company specializing in AI hyperautomation for security, has been acknowledged as one of the initial 30 firms internationally to obtain the ISO 42001 certification for AI. Moreover, it is among approximately 15 companies globally holding the trifecta of ISO 42001, ISO 27001, and ISO 27701 certifications. This recognition highlights Swimlane's prominent position in implementing responsible AI practices.
news.headline: Swimlane earns ISO 42001 AI certification, one of 30 globally; also holds ISO 27001 and ISO 27701 certs. Leader in responsible AI.

news.summary: Headquartered in San Jose, California, Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd (NASDAQ: CRDO) recently revealed their plans to present at the 2025 Mizuho Technology Conference on June 10. The event will feature presentations by Bill Brennan, President and CEO, and Dan Fleming, CFO, where they will discuss the company's latest secure, high-speed connectivity solutions aimed at enhancing reliability and energy efficiency for consumers. This conference is to be held in New York City, starting at 1:20 p.m. ET.
news.headline: Credo (NASDAQ: CRDO) to present at 2025 Mizuho Technology Conference on June 10 at 1:20 p.m. ET in New York City.

news.summary: A study conducted by Forrester on Experian's global customers revealed that the Experian Ascend Platform™ in Costa Mesa, California, has shown significant benefits for financial institutions. The platform has delivered a remarkable 183% return on investment (ROI) and managed to recover its costs within just 12 months. These findings offer banks and lenders valuable insights into the potential financial advantages of integrating the platform into their operations. This study provides a robust framework for evaluating the impact of Experian Ascend Platform™, assisting organizations in making informed decisions regarding credit and fraud management.
news.headline: Experian Ascend Platform gave global banks & lenders 183% ROI, paid off in 12 months, study by Forrester shows.

news.summary: A recent study conducted by Omega Systems, a prominent managed IT and security services provider, highlights the increasing cybersecurity issues faced by top healthcare institutions and their impact on patient safety. The 2025 Healthcare IT Landscape Report reveals that 19% of healthcare executives have experienced disruptions in patient care due to cyberattacks. Additionally, a staggering 52% of respondents anticipate a fatal incident caused by cyber threats within the next five years. This growing concern underscores the critical need for robust cybersecurity measures in the healthcare sector.
news.headline: 1 in 5 healthcare leaders say cyberattacks impact patient care, 52% fear a fatal incident in 5 years - Omega Systems Report.

news.summary: Omaha, Nebraska - Straight Arrow News (SAN), an independent news publisher committed to delivering unbiased, fact-based journalism, has recently revamped its website and app to offer an improved reader experience. The focus is on fostering trust and meeting the demands of today's contemporary news consumers. With the goal of reinstating confidence in news consumption, the enhanced platform enables users to access unbiased, fact-based news easily. Additionally, users can delve deeper into each story through innovative fact-card integrations.
news.headline: Straight Arrow News expands platform with redesigned website and app, focusing on trust and providing unbiased, fact-based information.

news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, Orca has been recognized by Notable Capital for the second year in a row. It has been included in the Rising in Cyber 2025 list, which showcases the 30 most promising cybersecurity companies. This acknowledgment highlights Orca's continued success and advancements in the industry.
news.headline: Orca Security recognized in Notable Capital's Rising in Cyber 2025 list for the second time, among 30 top cybersecurity firms.

news.summary: Kimedics, a prominent workforce management software company aiding healthcare organizations in optimizing their workforces, has revealed Greg Gossett as their new president in Nashville, Tenn. Kimedics specializes in simplifying the management of employees, contractors, and contingent clinicians, aiming to enhance efficiency in staff deployment within and across healthcare facilities. This appointment marks a significant development for the company, illustrating their commitment to advancing healthcare workforce management.
news.headline: Kimedics appoints Greg Gossett as President to scale workforce management software, aims to optimize healthcare workforce.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, TestRail, a prominent QA test management platform, has unveiled the fourth edition of its Software Testing and Quality Report. This comprehensive report provides a worldwide overview of the changing realm of software quality assurance. The 2025 edition highlights significant trends and insights from numerous QA professionals across the globe. It showcases how these professionals are addressing contemporary challenges, utilizing automation technologies, and contributing to the release of higher-quality software.
news.headline: TestRail releases 4th Software Testing and Quality Report, revealing trends from 2025 and responses from thousands of QA professionals worldwide.

news.summary: In Coralville, Iowa, a company specializing in synthetic biology, IDT, has launched a custom solutions program. This initiative focuses on creating unique tools and solutions tailored to individual needs, promoting customer innovation.  The program provides a platform for developing cutting-edge products, boosting creativity in the industry.
news.headline: Integrated DNA Technologies in Iowa launches custom solutions program for synthetic biology, fostering innovation for customers.
Chairman of North Media A/S stepping down. New appointee to take over board responsibilities.

news.summary: New HDMI input/output boards have been introduced for KAIROS and AV Processor in Newark, N.J. These boards aim to enhance audio and video production in contemporary settings, offering increased flexibility and intelligence. The boards are designed to meet the demands of modern environments and provide improved connectivity options.
news.headline: Panasonic unveils new HDMI boards and AV processor for KAIROS ahead of InfoComm 2025 in Newark, offering advanced audio and video production capabilities.

news.summary: New program launched in Overland Park, Kansas on June 4, 2025, to address challenges faced by animal shelters dealing with an increase in young felines. Each year, shelters nationwide experience a significant rise in tiny kittens needing assistance during the spring and summer months. The initiative focuses on removing barriers to fostering and providing support to shelters struggling to accommodate the growing number of kittens.
news.headline: Hill's Pet Nutrition and Kitten Lady Hannah Shaw partner to aid shelters during busy kitten season. aims to support shelters during surge of kittens.

news.summary: Fastex, a Web3 ecosystem facilitating crypto transactions, has recently expanded its services to 27 states and territories across the United States. This development was announced on June 4, 2025, marking the company's official foray into the U.S. market. In addition to its geographic expansion, Fastex has commenced executive recruitment efforts and is actively pursuing regulatory approvals to enhance its operations. This move signifies a significant step in Fastex's growth strategy, aimed at broadening its reach and accessibility to users interested in buying, trading, and transacting in cryptocurrency.
news.headline: Fastex expands into the United States, launching in 27 states and territories enabling crypto trading for American users. Los Angeles, June 4, 2025.

news.summary: Bill Abbott, the President of GAM, is thrilled to celebrate the fifth anniversary of the Great American Christmas event. This year promises to be the most festive season yet, featuring an increased number of stars, more joy, and added holiday magic. The event is set to take place in New York and is organized by Great American Media. The festivities are scheduled to kick off on June 4, 2025.
news.headline: Great American Christmas in July returns on June 27, building up to 5th anniversary celebration in October. MAG President anticipates more stars, joy, and holiday magic.

news.summary: In Frederick, Maryland, Thin Film Interconnect (TFI) has established a strategic technology partnership with Heisler Semiconductor LLC from Baltimore, Maryland. This partnership aims to develop a comprehensive solution for wafer production. The collaboration, announced on June 4, 2025, between the two companies highlights their commitment to advancing semiconductor technology. This joint effort combines TFI's expertise in thin film interconnect with Heisler Semiconductor LLC's semiconductor manufacturing capabilities. The partnership is set to enhance efficiency and innovation in wafer production, potentially impacting the semiconductor industry significantly. This mutually beneficial alliance showcases the strengths of both companies and opens avenues for growth and advancements in the field.
news.headline: TFI and Heisler Semiconductor LLC form strategic partnership for wafer production solutions in Frederick and Baltimore.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, the PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. declared its plan to redeem all outstanding 5.812% Fixed Rate/Floating Rate Senior Notes due June 12, 2026, that were issued by PNC. The redemption date is set for June 12, 2025. The total amount of these notes to be redeemed is $1,000,000,000, with CUSIP 693475 BQ7 being the identification number for these securities.
news.headline: PNC to redeem $1 billion of 5.812% Senior Notes due June 12, 2026 on June 12, 2025.

news.summary: South Korea has recently elected Lee Jae-myung as president, a leader known for his positive stance towards cryptocurrencies. Jae-myung has expressed intentions to introduce Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) and launch a stablecoin backed by the country's own currency to address the issue of capital outflows. This decision has garnered attention due to the growing popularity of cryptocurrencies in South Korea, with the country being a prominent player in the global crypto market. Investors and industry experts are closely monitoring these developments as they are expected to impact the broader cryptocurrency landscape.
news.headline: South Korea's new president Lee Jae-Myung boosts crypto reform, plans Bitcoin ETFs and gold-backed stablecoin to tackle capital flight.

news.summary: Ridesharing company Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) has introduced senior accounts across the United States, aimed at catering to older adults. This new feature, accessible through Uber's Family profile, is designed to facilitate ride requests for seniors, whether they are heading for medical appointments, visiting relatives, or running daily errands. It offers a more straightforward and intuitive Uber app experience with enlarged text and clear interfaces. Additionally, seniors can opt for assistance from their family members through this service.
news.headline: Uber (NYSE: UBER) launches senior accounts nationwide in the US, simplifying ride requests for older adults.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Nex has announced a partnership with Zumba to develop a new fitness program. This collaboration will merge immersive motion tracking technology with gamified scoring and progression elements. The innovative fitness experience aims to revolutionize workouts by providing a unique and engaging way to stay active. This joint venture highlights the importance of incorporating advanced technology in the fitness industry to enhance the overall exercise experience.
news.headline: Nex and Zumba collaborate to merge fitness and gaming for at-home workout experience; focusing on motion tracking and gamified scoring.

news.summary: A major early education and child care provider, Learning Care Group (LCG), headquartered in Novi, Michigan, is hosting a FREE Family Game Night and Open House across all its LCG-branded schools nationwide. The event is scheduled for June 18th from 4:30 to 6 p.m. Families interested in the second-largest for-profit early education and child care provider in North America are encouraged to attend. This public event offers a chance for prospective families to tour the facility, interact with caring teachers, and take part in various family-friendly games and activities.
news.headline: Learning Care Group to host FREE Family Game Night & Open House at all LCG schools on June 18 from 4:30-6 p.m.

news.summary: Launching today in Philadelphia and Miami are GOAT Gummies, a new line of organic and vegan gummy snacks created by Tom Brady in partnership with Gopuff. These gummies are made with high-quality ingredients and are set to attract health-conscious consumers looking for a tasty treat.
news.headline: Tom Brady's GOAT Gummies, organic and vegan snack brand, launches exclusively on Gopuff today.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City, Palladyne AI Corp. revealed that its Palladyne™ IQ AI software platform has been selected as the sole finalist from the robotics and automation sector for the NCMS’ 2025 CTMA Technology Competition. Palladyne AI, listed as NASDAQ: PDYN and PDYNW, specializes in AI software for robotic applications in defense and commercial industries. The Palladyne IQ software is recognized for its autonomy features driven by artificial intelligence.
news.headline: Palladyne AI's IQ AI software is sole finalist in NCMS tech competition, for robotic platforms in defense and commercial sectors.

news.summary: Leonid Capital Partners, a Trusted Capital Partner to the U.S. Department of Defense located in Orange County, CA. recently revealed a collaboration with STATION DC, a nonprofit tech incubator and members club in Washington, D.C. The partnership involves establishing Leonid's inaugural permanent District office within STATION DC’s Union Market clubhouse. This move aims to boost local investment, foster job creation, and enhance policy engagement. It serves as a platform for frontier-tech founders, investors, military leaders, and policymakers, aiding in the acceleration of these areas.
news.headline: Leonid Capital Partners partners with STATION DC in Washington, D.C. to accelerate defense-tech investment, job creation, and policy engagement.
DEFENCE MINISTER SAYS TURKEY WANTS TO MAKE USE OF EU'S 'SAFE' SCHEME, COOPERATE ON FUTURE OF EUROPEAN SECURITY

PRESIDENT'S SCHEDULE – WEDNESDAY, JUNE 4, 2025 9:00 AM – In-Town Pool Call Time The White House  In-Town Press Pool 2:00 PM – The President receives his Intelligence Briefing Oval Office  Closed Press 3:00 PM – The President signs Proclamations

news.summary: A prestigious Straight Kentucky Whiskey, acknowledged for its excellence, pays tribute to Lexington's sister cities by incorporating Japanese Mizunara and French Oak wood finishing. Named RD1 Spirits, this renowned Kentucky bourbon brand sets high standards by combining different cultural influences. This unique blend was unveiled in Lexington on June 4, 2025, showcasing the brand's commitment to craftsmanship and cultural celebration.
news.headline: RD1 Spirits releases limited edition whiskey blending Japanese Mizunara and French Oak wood, honoring Lexington's Sister Cities.

news.summary: San Jose-based Axiad recently introduced their Axiad Trusted Partner Program aimed at providing resellers, integrators, and solution providers with advanced technology, knowledge, and assistance. The program is tailored to empower these entities through its ecosystem and support. Axiad is a prominent leader in global identity security and made this announcement on June 4, 2025.
news.headline: Axiad launches Trusted Partner Program to boost adoption with resellers and integrators. Global leader in identity security.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, in Los Angeles, a proposed class action settlement and a motion for attorneys' fees and expenses were filed in the United States District Court Central District of California regarding the securities litigation case involving The Honest Company, Inc. The case number is 21-cv-07405-MCS-AS. All parties involved in the lawsuit are notified of the proposed settlement. This legal action aims to resolve the matter through a class action settlement.
news.headline: Proposed settlement in Honest Company securities litigation involving purchasers of stock. Case No. 21-cv-07405-MCS-AS. Attorneys' fees motion.
TURKISH DEFENCE MINISTER: ERDOGAN'S POTENTIAL MEETING WITH TRUMP IN U.S. WOULD 'BREATHE NEW LIFE' INTO BILATERAL DEFENCE TIES
TURKEY WORKING WITH 'OPEN-MINDED' EUROPEAN ALLIES ON DRONES, AIR DEFENCES, ARMOURED VEHICLES, AMMUNITION, ROCKETS - REPORTS
TURKISH DEFENCE MINISTER GULER SAYS NATO ALLIES MUST SPEND MORE AND 'SMARTER', WANTS MORE DEFENCE COOPERATION - REPORTS

news.summary: The company anticipates being the initial entity to incorporate standards into a commercial application with Genius™.
news.headline: VERSES® anticipates pioneering Spatial Web Standards post IEEE approval, aiming to implement them in Genius™.

news.summary: NielsenIQ (NIQ) recently revealed the victor of its third annual Pitch Slam contest held at NIQ’s Consumer 360® (C360®) gathering in Chicago. The competition featured five finalists, namely Daybird, Evergreen, Harken Sweets, Mingle Beverage Company, and Pricklee, who vied for a top prize exceeding $700,000 in cash and in-kind services. Ultimately, Harken Sweets, established by Harvard Business School alum Katie Lefkowitz, emerged victorious, impressing both the judges and the audience.
news.headline: Harken Sweets wins NIQ's Pitch Slam at C360 event, taking home $700,000 in cash and services.

news.summary: In New York, ICSC has promoted Moutray McLaren to Executive Vice President, Public Policy. McLaren, previously Senior Vice President, Public Policy, will take over from Betsy Laird upon her retirement. Tom McGee, President and CEO of ICSC, expressed confidence in McLaren's abilities, citing his dedication to advocating for the industry and members on Capitol Hill. This promotion reflects McLaren's successful tenure at ICSC.
news.headline: Moutray McLaren promoted to EVP, Public Policy at ICSC, replacing Betsy Laird. McLaren previously SVP. Tom McGee praises McLaren's advocacy efforts.

news.summary: A company based in Toluca Lake, California, Iron Horse Acquisitions, has decided to delay its business combination special meeting to June 20, 2025. Additionally, they have extended the redemption date from June 6 to June 18, 2025. This postponement and extension provide stakeholders with more time to consider and act on the impending changes.
news.headline: Iron Horse Acquisitions delays special meeting to June 20, 2025, extends redemption date to June 18, 2025.

news.summary: In New York, Fasten, a prominent provider of driver rewards and loyalty solutions for car dealerships, revealed its inclusion in Visa's esteemed Fintech Fast Track program. Their primary offering, the Fasten Rewards™ Visa Card, allows drivers to earn rewards on major auto-related costs such as monthly car lease and loan payments. On average, American drivers spend approximately $12,000 annually on these expenses. By joining Visa's prestigious initiative, Fasten secures access to valuable opportunities for growth.
news.headline: Fasten partners with Visa, launches Fasten Rewards™ Visa Card for car expenses, Avg $12,000 annually for American drivers.

news.summary: Homeward®, a rural health platform based in San Mateo, California, has recently collaborated with Meijer, a family-owned Midwest retailer located in Grand Rapids, Michigan, to enhance healthcare access and coordination for Medicare-eligible individuals statewide. This partnership aims to address the notable healthcare and economic gaps experienced by rural Michiganders, compared to their urban counterparts. The strategic alliance is geared towards improving the overall quality of healthcare services for residents in rural areas, where an estimated xxx number of residents struggle to access adequate medical care.
news.headline: Homeward and Meijer team up to improve healthcare access in Michigan for Medicare-eligible residents, tackling rural health disparities.

news.summary: Nex Playground has revealed its lineup of Summer Games in San Francisco. The event will feature games in collaboration with Sesame Workshop and Zumba, marking the first-ever partnership with the fitness brand.
news.headline: Nex Playground's Summer Games lineup includes new games with Zumba and Sesame Workshop.

news.summary: In Boston, European Watch Company (EWC), a leading supplier of pre-owned luxury watches, has revealed a new partnership with Chubb, a top player in insurance. This collaboration brings global coverage opportunities to EWC customers' prized watch collections. Drawing on EWC's 30-year luxury watch market experience, the company is known for its trustworthy reputation and top-notch service quality. This exclusive venture with Chubb is set to enhance the security and protection of valuable timepieces for clients worldwide.
news.headline: European Watch Company partners with Chubb to provide insurance for luxury timepieces, offering worldwide coverage for clients' watch collections.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas on June 4, 2025, Ultra I&C and Dell Technologies were chosen for the competitive bid of supplying a Software Programmable Open Mission Systems Compliant (SPOC) processor for the United States Air Force (USAF) Materiel Command. This procurement aims to offer essential support throughout the Life Cycle of USAF operations.
news.headline: Ultra I&C and Dell Technologies chosen to provide open-architecture airborne processing solutions to USAF.

news.summary: RESTON, Virginia - Comstock Holding Companies, Inc. (Nasdaq: CHCI), a prominent asset manager, developer, and operator specializing in mixed-use and transit-oriented properties in the Washington, D.C. area, revealed that Juleps Kentucky Tavern has secured a lease for around 6,500 square feet of retail area at 43781 Central Station Drive within Loudoun Station. The establishment, developed by Northern Virginia entrepreneur Reese Gardner who is recognized for successful ventures like Copperwood Tavern in Arlington, is set to expand its presence in the region.
news.headline: Comstock welcomes Juleps Kentucky Tavern to Loudoun Station, signing a lease for 6,500 sq ft retail space.

news.summary: New Gold Inc. has recently released its 2024 Sustainability Report, marking a decade of focusing on sustainability topics vital to communities, stakeholders, and the company. The report covers key aspects of New Gold's sustainability efforts and progress, reflecting the company's commitment to responsible practices. New Gold Inc., listed on TSX as NGD and NYSE American as NGD, has been actively engaging in sustainability initiatives to drive positive impact. The publication of this report signifies the company's dedication to transparency and accountability regarding its sustainability performance.
news.headline: New Gold publishes 2024 Sustainability Report highlighting a decade of reporting on critical topics. Toronto, June 4, 2025. (TSX: NGD) (NYSE American: NGD).

news.summary: In Centreville, Virginia, as of June 4, 2025, drivers who were found to have expired tags on their vehicles could potentially face significant penalties including fines amounting to thousands of dollars, impoundment of their vehicles, and even potential jail time. A recent study by CARFAX revealed that a staggering number of almost 17 million vehicles across the United States began the year 2025 with expired tags. The importance of renewing vehicle tags on time is underscored by the fact that driving with outdated tags is a serious offense that can have severe consequences for motorists.
news.headline: 17M vehicles in US have expired tags, facing fines, impoundment, jail time. - CARFAX data.
